mapper.select: SELECT * FROM order_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM order_info WHERE seat_id = #{seatId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM order_info WHERE seat_id = #{seatId} AND deleted = 0 AND status IN ('PAID', 'CHECKED_IN') AND ( (start_time < #{endTime} AND end_time > #{startTime}) )
